topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Restore Firefly read-only sync on financegnome.omniflow.cc (Sync Status + manual trigger pull ledger data); fix product API 404s (e.g. GET /api/v1/plans/risk-score); Settings exchange rows must reflect operator env (Bitunix configured shows Bitunix enabled+configured, not Binance enabled).

Sub-defect C: backend firefly connector + sync scheduler/API (/api/v1/sync/*), FIREFLY_BASE_URL/PAT env. D: backend plans risk-score route + Traefik financegnome-api router. E: backend settings exchanges view + default.toml enabled flags + SettingsPage exchange table.

US-0010 external profile post-BUG-0001/Q0007; Traefik split routers (API without basic-auth); AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=true; OIDC unset; do not read .env secrets; must not break OIDC-enabled or bundled-firefly deploys; wallet extension console noise out of scope.

Omniflow smoke: manual Firefly sync succeeds with entity counts >0; GET /api/v1/plans/risk-score returns 200 JSON (or documented empty-state) via financegnome-api router; Settings shows Bitunix enabled+configured when only BITUNIX_* env set; automated tests for settings mapping and sync error paths where feasible.

Operator confirms financegnome.omniflow.cc Firefly data visible after sync, Planning risk score loads without 404, Settings exchange table matches configured env; BUG-0002 acceptance rows C+D+E checked on external profile.

decomposition.rationale: Same operator report (2026-06-04), environment (US-0010 external / financegnome.omniflow.cc), and post-BUG-0001 smoke session; sub-defects C (Firefly sync), D (API 404), E (exchange settings UI) tracked under one BUG-0002 for discovery decomposition.
alternatives_considered: BUG-0002 firefly-only + BUG-0003 API-only + BUG-0004 settings-only — rejected for intake to avoid duplicate environment/evidence blocks; fixes remain independently testable via sub-defect acceptance rows C/D/E
